node.statement: SUBROUTINE 3C — Block Encoding of C_f^{1/2} Applied to Initial State: Prepare |v_c> = C_f^{1/2} hat_u_c / ||C_f^{1/2} hat_u_c|| which has ||C_f^{1/2} hat_u_c|| = Omega(1) by Corollary 2 (eigenfunction weight on fission region). This ensures constant success probability for QPE. Requires a block encoding of C_f^{1/2} with O(1) block-encoding factor (Theorem 4: C block-diagonal with O(1) condition number).
